text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, Mejiro Ryan drags me out to an
unpopulated island.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Take a look at that awesome rock wall!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
This island is a pretty well-known natural rock
climbing spot.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yep, I'm gonna climb up! Wait for me up top,
okay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ryan heads off to climb the cliff, and I start to
walk up the slope that leads to its summit.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She keeps climbing, relying only on raw physical
strength, until she's finally close to the top.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But her endurance is reaching its limit!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Just a little more, almost there...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I came this far... I have to make it to the top!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Whew! I made it! This exhaustion feels great!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Hey, thanks for reaching out to me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
It feels like my entire body got stronger. My arms,
shoulders, back, legs...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
In fact, I bet I could run any race I want to right
now! Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan seems to have grown stronger after
overcoming her rocky ascent.
